title: Rainbow Computer Accessories
excerpt: There’s nothing that makes me happier than rainbows! I always get asked why I love them so much. There’s just something magical about the colors in the world in one place. When I see a rainbow, I feel hope and…
body:
There’s nothing that makes me happier than rainbows! I always get asked why I love them so much. There’s just something magical about the colors in the world in one place. When I see a rainbow, I feel hope and happiness. They make me smile.

And of course I gotta love my rainbow accessories! My rainbow keyboard cover is from Amazon and my rainbow mouse pad is from The Crafted Life.

Are there any other fun rainbow accessories I should add to my collection? Let me know in a comment below!
